title: Usopp Is Hurt
description: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why... Did it end up like this...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The ship looks as good as always.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But I like Going Merry Very much!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But there's no way to save it....

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This afternoon is filled with trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's amazing!! You guys did very well!

summary: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
